description: Share full presentation async to Tim/Gilad. Include SEO data, keyword rankings, traffic stats.
Oversee intro of LLM/generative AI concepts in marketing. Balance new direction reveal vs protecting competitive advantage. Approve content before publication.
Analyze new Imubit strategy (coordinated operating strategies, maturity model). Propose gentle content rollout plan. Avoid revealing sensitive details/blueprints.
Explore using ChatGPT to generate sample content. Integrate LLMs/agentic AI with existing Imubit offerings. Focus on empowering/upskilling workforce. Run drafts by Tim/Gilad.
